content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.23%, Bank Nifty +2.33%, Pharma +2.6%, Auto +2.22%, PSU Bank +2.64%. VIX down 5.86% to 16.86 confirms risk-on. Book is well-positioned with 11 CNC longs all green or near flat. Priority is trailing SLs on winners into close, not adding new exposure with 44 minutes left.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24500
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +7.6%, well above breakeven. Trailing SL from 1037.62 to 1040 (just above intraday support 1042-1043 zone, ~1.8% below CMP 1059). Maintains trail-gap discipline. Thesis intact: ICICI Sec target 1350, Q4 strong, RBI easing tailwind. Note: stored SL 1037.62 is already above entry 984 — winner is locked."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.4%, broke to new ATH zone. Stored SL 1715 sits 2.4% below CMP 1757.10. Trailing to 1730 (1.5% below CMP, above intraday low 1718.60 reaction zone). Locks in larger gain while honoring 1% trail-gap minimum. Thesis intact: Q4 +26.5% revenue, JPM OW, dividend record date Jun 12."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Hold — board meeting May 14 (6 trading sessions away, beyond 3-session binary window so not requiring event-discipline trim yet). SL at entry 4575 (~1.2% below CMP 4630.40, compliant with 1% trail-gap floor). No-op MODIFY on values, but explicit HOLD logic — no change needed. Switching to HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.0%, gold consolidating after pullback to $4,540/oz. SL 119 still appropriate (~4% below CMP). No trailing warranted at a loss. Thesis intact for hedge/diversification. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 +114% PAT, EBITDA +80%, capex raised. CMP 7049, stored SL 6960 (1.3% below CMP) — already at trail-gap floor. No-op MODIFY; hold via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0% on +9.84% sector basket day. SL at entry 838 (1% below CMP 846.70 — exactly at trail-gap floor). Q4 board meeting pending in May = binary risk; don't tighten further. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position flat (+0.1%), Q4 strong (+30% PAT), MOSL TP 325 raised. SL 362 (1.8% below CMP 369.25). Hold — too early to tighten on a fresh entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position essentially flat (-0.1%). SL 818 (0.4% below CMP 819.50) is already inside trail-gap floor — risk-layer concern but tightening further would force exit on noise. Leave as-is; if stopped today, accept small loss. No MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +134% (one-time tax benefit aided), Q1 FY27 guided FLAT QoQ — overhang. SL 1265 (1.4% below CMP 1283.20) at trail-gap floor. No-op MODIFY values; hold via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.2% intraday, position now +0.1%. SL 2980 (1.6% below CMP 3027.40) appropriate. Capital Goods cluster strong. Don't chase tighter SL into intraday euphoria. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results pop +10.46% but position only +0.4% (high entry). SL 790 (~2.2% below CMP 809). Hold — momentum intact, no change."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "Locking +5.7% gain via trail to 1040 (above intraday support cluster, 1.8% below CMP)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL 119 fine."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to 1730 to lock in +1.8% minimum on what was a +3.4% winner; honors 1% trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Board meeting May 14 — 6 sessions away, outside 3-session binary window. Will revisit closer to event for trim/exit decision."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at trail-gap floor (1.3% below CMP). No-op."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results pending in May — binary event risk. Keep SL at entry 838 (1% gap to CMP); don't over-tighten ahead of unknown date."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry, position flat. SL 362 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 818 already very tight; further tightening would force noise-exit. Allow trade to develop or stop out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1265 at trail-gap floor; Q1 FY27 flat-QoQ guide is the overhang to watch."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position barely positive; SL 2980 appropriate. Defence basket euphoric — let it breathe."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4%; SL 790 ~2% below CMP appropriate. Momentum from Q4 intact."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HINDPETRO +6.73% on crude relief — one-day bounce, not adding into Energy sector with already 11 holdings. M&M Q4 strong but ran 5.68% — chase-trade risk this late. SRF, AUROPHARMA, BIOCON, NEULANDLAB, AJANTPHARM all participating in sector rallies but adding at 14:45 with 44min left = poor R:R. CANCEL the stale HFCL OPEN order placed 599 minutes ago — setup is stale.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 54%, cash 46% — comfortable positioning. 11 CNC names, mostly Q4-earnings-driven entries from this morning. No new entries warranted at 14:45: (a) no fresh setup beats existing exposure, (b) chase-risk into close on stocks already up 5-10%, (c) book audit/SL trail is the higher-value action. Capital Goods cluster (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH) at ~13% of capital — at limit, no more defence/cap-goods adds. Financial Services (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS) ~17% — no more BFSI adds. HAL board meeting May 14 will require trim/tighten decision in 3-4 sessions. Day 17 of 180; 5-day P&L is -608, win rate 14% — discipline focus is on letting winners run via trail SLs, which today's plan does.",
  "cancel_orders": [
    {
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "reasoning": "OPEN BUY MIS LIMIT 133.50 placed 599 minutes ago (~10 hours, pre-open). Setup stale, never filled, not in current watchlist or thesis. CANCEL to clean order book."
    }
  ]
}
